headline: A Look At Salesforce (CRM) Valuation As AI Agentforce Progress And Expanded Buybacks Signal Confidence
summary: What the latest AI and buyback moves mean for Salesforce stock Salesforce (CRM) is back in focus after management highlighted improving bookings, expanding use of its Agentforce AI platform, and a larger stock buyback plan that together signal clear intentions around capital allocation and product direction. For you as an investor, the combination of stronger customer activity, deeper AI adoption by large clients such as the U.S. Department of Labor, and an accelerated repurchase program...
